texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: TERMS AND CONDITIONS
texts.text: TERMS AND CONDITIONS

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The rates are commissionable at 10%
texts.text: The rates are commissionable at 10%

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The tour agent will ensure that the booking voucher is delivered to the hotel reception upon guest check-in
texts.text: The tour agent will ensure that the booking voucher is delivered to the hotel reception upon guest check-in

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All bills must be paid before the guest checks out
texts.text: All bills must be paid before the guest checks out

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · For children aged 3-12 sharing with a parent a charge of 50% of one adult shall apply and 75% of room rate if in their own room
texts.text: For children aged 3-12 sharing with a parent a charge of 50% of one adult shall apply and 75% of room rate if in their own room

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · An adult rate applies for children over 12 years of age
texts.text: An adult rate applies for children over 12 years of age

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Check in time is 1400hrs
texts.text: Check in time is 1400hrs

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Check out time is 1000hours
texts.text: Check out time is 1000hours

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Late checkout is subject to availability at an extra charge
texts.text: Late checkout is subject to availability at an extra charge

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · For rooms reserved and as a result of acts of God, acts of the government or
texts.text: For rooms reserved and as a result of acts of God, acts of the government or

texts.label: text
texts.orig: other authorities, war, hostilities, civil disturbances, strikes, riots, epidemics, quarantines or as a result of any cause beyond the control of Burch's Resort, the hotel will not incur liability to provide accommodation
texts.text: other authorities, war, hostilities, civil disturbances, strikes, riots, epidemics, quarantines or as a result of any cause beyond the control of Burch's Resort, the hotel will not incur liability to provide accommodation

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Bank transfers and company cheques will be accepted as payment seven days prior to arrival date
texts.text: Bank transfers and company cheques will be accepted as payment seven days prior to arrival date

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Booking is only guaranteed upon payment of 50% deposit. In case of nonpayment, the hotel will cancel the booking without prior notice
texts.text: Booking is only guaranteed upon payment of 50% deposit. In case of nonpayment, the hotel will cancel the booking without prior notice

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Either party may terminate this contract for any reason given a 30-days' notice
texts.text: Either party may terminate this contract for any reason given a 30-days' notice

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · This contract is valid from January 2025 to November 2025
texts.text: This contract is valid from January 2025 to November 2025

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The rates are subject to change without notice.
texts.text: The rates are subject to change without notice.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CANCELLATION AND NO - SHOW FEES.
texts.text: CANCELLATION AND NO - SHOW FEES.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · In case of cancellation within 24 hours from noon on date of accommodation or no-shows, 100% of the booking rate shall be charged.
texts.text: In case of cancellation within 24 hours from noon on date of accommodation or no-shows, 100% of the booking rate shall be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · In case of cancellation within 48 hours from noon on date of accommodation or no-shows, 50% of the booking rate shall be charged.
texts.text: In case of cancellation within 48 hours from noon on date of accommodation or no-shows, 50% of the booking rate shall be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · In case of cancellation between 7 days to 2 days from noon on the date of accommodation 25% of the applicable rate shall be charged.
texts.text: In case of cancellation between 7 days to 2 days from noon on the date of accommodation 25% of the applicable rate shall be charged.
